creator: adrian@ubergeeks.com
text:
Hi again,

Here's another update to this PR.  The utility is pretty high, so I hope
this gets committed sooner rather than later.

This PR was made compatible with /usr/ports from about two days ago.  While
at it, I slightly reoganized my original PR from providing only
amanda24-client and amanda24-server packages, so that it no also include a
plain amanda24 package which contains both the server and clients.

	Adrian
--
[ adrian@ubergeeks.com -- Ubergeeks Consulting -- http://www.ubergeeks.com/ ]
